narrative:
Butler Township has 6,293 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
